creator: jbo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for handling this so quickly - much appreciated!

Unfortunately, I still observe the exact same problem after upgrading to octave-forge-control-4.0.0_1.
Is there anything else I should be aware of?

Shouldn't matter but I'm building my own binary repositories via poudriere. Definitely got 4.0.0_1 on my desktop now tho.
